items.title: Sentry to take over as title sponsor of PGA Tour event at Torrey Pines
items.desc: The PGA Tour says The Sentry will be played January 27-30 at Torrey Pines. It will end on a Saturday next year to avoid the NFL conference championship games. Torrey Pines has hosted a PGA Tour event since 1968.
